prospect_pool_id.description: Id of the prospect pool this stage belongs to. Stage names are unique (case-insensitive) within a pool but can repeat across pools.

name.description: Name of the stage as it appears inside the prospect pool (e.g. `Not Reviewed`, `In Discussion`, `Keep Warm - Senior`). Stage names are entirely customer-defined per pool; there is no Greenhouse-managed default set, though new pools are typically seeded with starter stages such as `Not Reviewed`.

sort_order.description: Position of this stage within its prospect pool, ascending. Used by the Greenhouse UI to render stages in a fixed order; lower values appear first.

description: Schema for the 'prospect_pool_stages' stream, linked to the '/v3/prospect_pool_stages' endpoint.
